message:
perf,refactor: optimize CBOR canonicalization and enhance diagnostics/runtime

CBOR optimization (fcp-cbor/lib.rs):
- Optimize canonicalize_map() to use single reusable scratch Vec for
  key serialization instead of individual allocations per key
- Track keys as Range<usize> into scratch buffer instead of owned Vec<u8>
- Reduces allocation pressure in deterministic CBOR serialization

Diagnostics & Runtime:
- Enhance doctor checks for inventory and policy features
- Add resilience patterns for async registry mutations
- Update SDK runtime context to propagate new Cx fields (principal,
  target, approval, request context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
